source.policy: Build-time ingest only — runtime reads this file, never calls X.

operator.bio: God=1D spine of all. Higher D ⊃ (lower +1), never 0. A edgeless. Thing-within-thing gazes ∞. Reduced: air & soup co-arise, permeate, flavor each other. No edges
operator.posts_note: Operator posts on X — Hostess 7 mirrors tone locally.
